<agents>
Here is a list of agents that can be used when running a subagent.
Each agent has optionally a description with the agent's purpose and expertise. When asked to run a subagent, choose the most appropriate agent from this list.
Use the #tool:agent/runSubagent tool with the agent name to run the subagent.
<agent>
<name>gsd-advisor-researcher</name>
<description>Researches a single gray area decision and returns a structured comparison table with rationale. Spawned by discuss-phase advisor mode.</description>
</agent>
<agent>
<name>gsd-assumptions-analyzer</name>
<description>Deeply analyzes codebase for a phase and returns structured assumptions with evidence. Spawned by discuss-phase assumptions mode.</description>
</agent>
<agent>
<name>gsd-codebase-mapper</name>
<description>Explores codebase and writes structured analysis documents. Spawned by map-codebase with a focus area (tech, arch, quality, concerns). Writes documents directly to reduce orchestrator context load.</description>
</agent>
<agent>
<name>gsd-debugger</name>
<description>Investigates bugs using scientific method, manages debug sessions, handles checkpoints. Spawned by /gsd:debug orchestrator.</description>
</agent>
<agent>
<name>gsd-executor</name>
<description>Executes GSD plans with atomic commits, deviation handling, checkpoint protocols, and state management. Spawned by execute-phase orchestrator or execute-plan command.</description>
</agent>
<agent>
<name>gsd-integration-checker</name>
<description>Verifies cross-phase integration and E2E flows. Checks that phases connect properly and user workflows complete end-to-end.</description>
</agent>
<agent>
<name>gsd-nyquist-auditor</name>
<description>Fills Nyquist validation gaps by generating tests and verifying coverage for phase requirements</description>
</agent>
<agent>
<name>gsd-phase-researcher</name>
<description>Researches how to implement a phase before planning. Produces RESEARCH.md consumed by gsd-planner. Spawned by /gsd:plan-phase orchestrator.</description>
</agent>
<agent>
<name>gsd-plan-checker</name>
<description>Verifies plans will achieve phase goal before execution. Goal-backward analysis of plan quality. Spawned by /gsd:plan-phase orchestrator.</description>
</agent>
<agent>
<name>gsd-planner</name>
<description>Creates executable phase plans with task breakdown, dependency analysis, and goal-backward verification. Spawned by /gsd:plan-phase orchestrator.</description>
</agent>
<agent>
<name>gsd-project-researcher</name>
<description>Researches domain ecosystem before roadmap creation. Produces files in .planning/research/ consumed during roadmap creation. Spawned by /gsd:new-project or /gsd:new-milestone orchestrators.</description>
</agent>
<agent>
<name>gsd-research-synthesizer</name>
<description>Synthesizes research outputs from parallel researcher agents into SUMMARY.md. Spawned by /gsd:new-project after 4 researcher agents complete.</description>
</agent>
<agent>
<name>gsd-roadmapper</name>
<description>Creates project roadmaps with phase breakdown, requirement mapping, success criteria derivation, and coverage validation. Spawned by /gsd:new-project orchestrator.</description>
</agent>
<agent>
<name>gsd-ui-auditor</name>

import 'cubit/joint_consent_cubit.dart';

class JointConsentQr extends StatefulWidget {
  const JointConsentQr({required this.formState, super.key});

  final fp.FormState formState;

  @override
  State<JointConsentQr> createState() => _JointConsentQrState();
}

class _JointConsentQrState extends State<JointConsentQr> {
  static const int _autoApiCallIntervalSeconds = 30;
  static const int _timeoutMinutes = 5;

  late final JointConsentCubit _bloc;
  Timer? _statusTimer;
  Timer? _timeoutTimer;
  bool _hasStartedPolling = false;
  bool _hasTimedOut = false;
  bool _hasNavigated = false;

  @override
  void initState() {
    super.initState();
    _bloc = JointConsentCubit()..initiateKycJourney(widget.formState);
  }

  @override
  void dispose() {
    _stopPolling();
    _bloc.close();
    super.dispose();
  }

  void _startPolling() {
    if (_hasStartedPolling) return;
    _hasStartedPolling = true;

    _statusTimer = Timer.periodic(
      const Duration(seconds: _autoApiCallIntervalSeconds),
      (_) {
        if (_hasTimedOut || _bloc.state.isConsentProvided) {
          _stopPolling();
          return;
        }
        _bloc.triggerGetStatus();
      },
    );

    _timeoutTimer = Timer(const Duration(minutes: _timeoutMinutes), () {
      _hasTimedOut = true;
      _stopPolling();
    });
  }

  void _stopPolling() {
    _statusTimer?.cancel();
    _timeoutTimer?.cancel();
    _statusTimer = null;
    _timeoutTimer = null;
  }

  Future<void> _navigateToJointCustomerReview() async {
    if (!mounted) return;
    await context.push('/JointCustomerReview', extra: widget.formState);
  }

  @override
  Widget build(BuildContext context) {
    return BlocProvider.value(
      value: _bloc,
      child: Scaffold(
        body: BlocConsumer<JointConsentCubit, JointConsentState>(
          listener: (context, state) async {
            if (state.initiateKycResult != null) {
              _startPolling();
            }

            if (state.isConsentProvided && !_hasNavigated) {
              _hasNavigated = true;
              _stopPolling();
              await _navigateToJointCustomerReview();
            }
          },
          builder: (context, state) {
            final qrUrl = state.initiateKycResult?.responseParam.url;
            final showQr = !state.isLoading && qrUrl != null;

            return SmartBaseScreen(
              title: JourneyProgressUtils.getSelectedProductName(
                widget.formState,
                fallbackName: '',
              ),
              subtitle: '',
              version: 'v1.0.19',
              showBackButton: true,
              onBackPressed: () {
                _handleBackPressed(context);
              },
              body: Container(
                decoration: BoxDecoration(
                  color: AppColors.surfaceColor(context),
                  borderRadius: const BorderRadius.only(
                    topLeft: Radius.circular(16),
                    topRight: Radius.circular(16),
                  ),
                ),
                child: SingleChildScrollView(
                  child: Column(
                    children: [
                      24.verticalSpacing,
                      Padding(
                        padding: const EdgeInsets.symmetric(horizontal: 20),
                        child: Row(
                          children: [
                            Expanded(
                              child: Text(
                                'Request Primary Account Holder to scan QR',
                                style: ResponsiveTypography.title7SemiBold(
                                    context),
                              ),
                            ),
                          ],
                        ),
                      ),
                      4.verticalSpacing,
                      Padding(
                        padding: const EdgeInsets.symmetric(horizontal: 20),
                        child: Text(
                          'On scanning QR, the primary customer needs to provide consents regarding joint account addition and OTP which will be send on the provided number.',
                          style: ResponsiveTypography.bodyp4(context),
                        ),
                      ),
                      24.verticalSpacing,
                      Container(
                        padding: const EdgeInsets.all(16),
                        decoration: BoxDecoration(
                          border: Border.all(color: const Color(0xFFE5E7EB)),
                          borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(16),
                        ),
                        child: showQr
                            ? QrImageView(
                                padding: const EdgeInsets.all(2),
                                eyeStyle: QrEyeStyle(
                                    eyeShape: QrEyeShape.squircle,
                                    color: Theme.of(context).brightness ==
                                            Brightness.dark
                                        ? Colors.white
                                        : Colors.black),
                                dataModuleStyle: QrDataModuleStyle(
                                    dataModuleShape: QrDataModuleShape.circle,
                                    color: Theme.of(context).brightness ==
                                            Brightness.dark
                                        ? Colors.white
                                        : Colors.black),
                                data: qrUrl,
                                size: 220,
                                embeddedImage: const AssetImage(
                                  'assets/png/hdfc_logo.png',
                                  package: 'smtnow_sw_onboarding_pkg',
                                ),
                                embeddedImageStyle: const QrEmbeddedImageStyle(
                                    size: Size(50, 50)),
                              )
                            : _buildLoadingWidget(context),
                      ),
                      28.verticalSpacing,
                      Text(
                        'Or Share Consent Link with Customer',
                        style: ResponsiveTypography.bodyp1Primary(context)
                            .copyWith(color: AppColors.primaryColor(context)),
                      ),
                      36.verticalSpacing,
                      Padding(
                        padding: ResponsiveUtils.getResponsiveHorizontalPadding(
                            context,
                            phone: 20,
                            tablet: 40,
                            desktop: 64),
                        child: ResponsiveGridWidget(
                          config: const ResponsiveGridConfig(
                            desktopItemsPerRow: 4,
                            tabletItemsPerRow: 3,
                            mobileItemsPerRow: 1,
                            desktopItemWidth: 2,
                            tabletItemWidth: 4,
                            mobileItemWidth: 12,
                          ),
                          children: [
                            PrimaryButton(
                              onPressed: () => context
                                  .read<JointConsentCubit>()
                                  .triggerGetStatus(),
                              label: 'Continue',
                            ),
                          ],
                        ),
                      ),
                      28.verticalSpacing,
                      Padding(
                        padding: const EdgeInsets.symmetric(horizontal: 20),
                        child: Container(
                          padding: const EdgeInsets.all(8),
                          decoration: BoxDecoration(
                            color: AppColors.of(context).primary100,
                            borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(12),
                          ),
                          child: Row(
                            children: [
                              SvgPicture.asset(
                                Assets.svg.info,
                                fit: BoxFit.fitWidth,
                                height: 20,
                                package: 'smtnow_sw_common_presentation',
                              ),
                              const SizedBox(width: 12),
                              Expanded(
                                child: Text(
                                  context.ln.resumeApplicationInfo,
                                  style:
                                      ResponsiveTypography.title9Medium(context)
                                          .copyWith(
                                    color: AppColors.primaryDarkColor(context),
                                  ),
                                ),
                              ),
                            ],
                          ),
                        ),
                      ),
                      24.verticalSpacing,
                      Padding(
                        padding: ResponsiveUtils.getResponsiveHorizontalPadding(
                            context,
                            phone: 20,
                            tablet: 40,
                            desktop: 64),
                        child: ResponsiveGridWidget(
                          config: const ResponsiveGridConfig(
                            desktopItemsPerRow: 4,
                            tabletItemsPerRow: 3,
                            mobileItemsPerRow: 1,
                            desktopItemWidth: 2,
                            tabletItemWidth: 4,
                            mobileItemWidth: 12,
                          ),
                          children: [
                            PrimaryButton(
                              onPressed: () => _handleContinuePressed(context),
                              label: 'Proceed',
                            ),
                          ],
                        ),
                      ),
                    ],
                  ),
                ),
              ),
            );
          },
        ),
      ),
    );
  }

  Widget _buildLoadingWidget(BuildContext context) {
    return Column(
      children: [
        Text(
          'Please wait, displaying QR code.',
          textAlign: TextAlign.center,
          style: StaticTypography.paragraphLargeSemiBold.copyWith(
            color: AppColors.primaryColor(context),
          ),
        ),
        20.verticalSpacing,
        const SizedBox(
          width: 52,
          height: 52,
          child: Image(
            image: AssetImage(
              'packages/smtnow_sw_onboarding_pkg/assets/gif/hdfc_loader.gif',
            ),
            fit: BoxFit.contain,
          ),
        ),
        20.verticalSpacing,
        Text(
          context.ln.doNotCloseWindow,
          textAlign: TextAlign.center,
          style: StaticTypography.paragraphMediumSemiBold.copyWith(
            color: AppColors.secondaryColor(context),
          ),
        ),
      ],
    );
  }

  void _handleContinuePressed(BuildContext context) {
    // placeholder for now
  }

  void _handleBackPressed(BuildContext context) {
    // placeholder for now
  }
}
